thought.text:
Note: `task4-llm` requires API key. The test cmake will try to invoke `task4-llm` only on `llm-performance/*` cases. Since we don't have a real API key, those would fail (it'd hit the API). But the `task4` target depends on both. Let me check what tests are running and try.

First, let me try to do `task4-score` with `task4-llm` likely failing on LLM cases (but we should still get most points from classic cases):

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task4 2>&1 | tail -20", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Build task4 target"}
